title: hearth-loom.pr.merged v1
description: Emitted by hearth-loom's Publisher.PublishPRMerged (internal/bus/publisher.go) when autoloom successfully merges a bead's PR. Consumed for accurate cycle-time metrics (claim→merge wall time) and to distinguish merge from other close reasons. Source: /hearth-loom.

bead_id.description: Bead id this PR was merged for.

execution_id.description: Loomie execution identifier — correlates to loom.lifecycle.v1 execution_id.

base_branch.description: Base branch the PR was merged into.

repo.description: Repository the PR was merged against.

commit_sha.description: Merge commit SHA (or head SHA, depending on merge_method).

merge_method.description: How the PR was merged. Matches hearth-loom's MergeMethod const set.

merged_by.description: GitHub login of whoever/whatever performed the merge. Optional — omitted when unknown.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the event was published.
